meta.desc: MTS - Manufacturing System Technology: electrical equipment, electronic assemblies, special machines, robotic integration, maintenance and industrial equipment distribution.
meta.title: MTS — Manufacturing Technology System | Industrial Automation Morocco
sidebar.about_text: Special machines, robotics, machine vision, conveyors, and electrical engineering for automotive and manufacturing.
hero.title: Engineering the Future of Manufacturing
hero.desc: MTS delivers turnkey industrial automation solutions — from special machines and robotic cells to machine vision and conveyor systems. Based in Tanger, serving tier-1 automotive leaders across Morocco and internationally.
index.about.title: Your Industrial Automation Partner in Morocco
index.about.desc1: MTS — Manufacturing Technology System is a Moroccan industrial automation integrator based in Tanger. We design, build, and commission turnkey solutions for manufacturing environments: special machines, robotic workcells, machine vision systems, conveyors, and industrial electrical engineering.
index.about.quote: L'Innovation pour votre Productivité — Innovation for your Productivity
index.about.card_desc: From special machines to robotic integration, we deliver comprehensive automation solutions for manufacturing.
index.services.title: Comprehensive Industrial Automation Solutions
index.services.card1_desc: Design, manufacturing and integration of custom special machines for automated assembly, testing, and production processes across automotive and industrial sectors.
index.services.card2_desc: Defect detection, dimensional control, barcode reading, deep learning-based intelligent inspection solutions for quality assurance in manufacturing.
index.services.card3_desc: Pick and place, depalletizing and palletizing, decasing and encasing, robotic gluing and dispensing, end-of-arm tooling (EOAT) for automated production.
index.services.card4_desc: Indexed pallet conveyors, chain, belt and band conveyors, carousel conveyors for automated material handling and production line feeding.
index.services.community_desc: Design, manufacturing and integration of electrical equipment: cable harnesses, cabinets, control panels for industrial applications.
index.achievements.title: Expert Solutions to Power Your Industrial Growth
index.achievements.projects_desc: Successfully delivered automation projects across automotive, electronics, and manufacturing industries in Morocco and internationally.
index.achievements.experience_desc: Over a decade of industrial automation expertise serving tier-1 automotive suppliers and manufacturing leaders.
index.achievements.sites_desc: Multiple facilities equipped with state-of-the-art technology for machine building, electrical assembly, and system integration.
index.solutions.title: Transforming Manufacturing with Automation
index.solutions.funfact: Finished creative projects successfully using our automation expertise
index.team.title: The People Behind Our Success
index.testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
index.testimonials.t1_text: MTS delivered exceptional electrical cabinet integration for our railway fleet. Their attention to quality and certification standards is outstanding.
index.testimonials.t4_text: MTS delivered a complex automated assembly line for our automotive plant, completed on time and exceeding quality expectations.
index.values.title: What Drives Us
index.values.desc: Our principles guide every automation project we deliver.
index.faq.a1: MTS primarily serves the automotive industry and its tier-1 suppliers, including manufacturers of connectors, electronics, filtration systems, and wire harnesses. We also serve general manufacturing and industrial sectors.
index.faq.q3: How can I request a quote?
index.clients.title: Trusted by Automotive & Industrial Leaders
about.banner.title: About MTS
about.hero.title: Your Trusted Automation Partner in Morocco
about.hero.desc: MTS is a manufacturing system technology company specializing in the design, manufacturing and integration of special machines, machine vision, conveyor systems, robotics, and electrical engineering solutions. With a strong presence across multiple production sites in Morocco, we serve tier-1 automotive clients including Marelli, APTIV, TE Connectivity, and OPmobility.
about.values.title: Our Values in Action
about.values.respect_desc: We foster a culture of mutual respect with our employees, clients, partners, and the environment in every project.
about.values.innovation_desc: Constantly exploring new technologies and methods to provide our clients with cutting-edge industrial solutions.
about.values.commitment_desc: We are deeply committed to our clients' success, delivering on time with the highest quality standards.
about.values.quality_desc: ISO 9001, IRIS, EN9100 certified — we maintain the highest international standards in every project.
about.values.safety_desc: Health and Safety are embedded in our DNA — we ensure safe working conditions across all our sites.

team.why.title: Why Work With Us
team.why.desc: Join a team committed to engineering excellence and industrial automation innovation.
team.why.item1: Innovative projects for leading automotive brands
team.cta.title: Reliable Automation Solutions. Experienced Team. Proven Results.
team.cta.desc: From special machines to robotic integration, MTS delivers end-to-end industrial automation solutions you can trust.
service.banner.title: Comprehensive Industrial Automation Solutions
service.expertise.title: End-to-End Industrial Automation Solutions
service.expertise.desc: From concept to commissioning, MTS delivers turnkey automation solutions tailored to your manufacturing needs. We combine mechanical design, electrical engineering, robotics, and vision technology to solve complex production challenges.
service.card.electrical.title: Electrical Engineering
service.card.electrical.desc: Electrical and pneumatic cabinet wiring, distribution panel design, PLC and HMI programming, on-site installation and commissioning.
service.card.electronics.title: Machine Vision
service.card.electronics.desc: Defect detection, dimensional control, barcode reading, and deep learning-based intelligent inspection solutions.
service.card.machines.title: Special Machines & Robotics
service.card.machines.desc: Custom automated assembly lines, robotic workcells, pick and place, palletizing, and end-of-arm tooling.
service.card.maintenance.title: Maintenance & Support
service.card.maintenance.desc: Industrial equipment maintenance, repair, on-site support, and technical assistance for automation systems.
service.card.distribution.title: Conveyor Systems
service.card.distribution.desc: Indexed pallet conveyors, chain and belt conveyors, carousel systems for automated material handling.
service.card.consulting.title: Automation Consulting
service.card.consulting.desc: Expert consulting for manufacturing automation, feasibility studies, and production line optimization.
service.why.title: Why Choose MTS for Your Automation Projects
service.why.1.title: Proven Automotive Expertise
service.why.1.desc: Trusted by tier-1 automotive giants including Marelli, APTIV, TE Connectivity, OPmobility, and SOGEFI for complex automation projects.
service.why.2.title: Moroccan Proximity, Global Standards
service.why.2.desc: Based in Tanger Free Zone, we offer the advantage of local presence with competitive pricing compared to European integrators, without compromising quality.
service.why.3.title: End-to-End Capability
service.why.3.desc: From mechanical design and electrical engineering to PLC programming and on-site commissioning, we handle every aspect of your automation project.
service.cta.title: Need an Automation Solution?
service.cta.desc: Contact our engineering team to discuss your specific requirements.
details.banner.title: Industrial Automation Solutions
details.work.title: Special Machines, Robotics & Automation Solutions
details.work.service1.title: Automated Assembly Lines
details.work.service1.desc: Design and manufacturing of custom automated assembly lines for automotive and industrial applications.
details.work.service2.title: Robotic Workcells
details.work.service2.desc: Robotic integration including pick and place, palletizing, gluing, and end-of-arm tooling solutions.
details.work.service3.title: Machine Vision Systems
details.work.service3.desc: Vision inspection solutions for defect detection, dimensional control, and quality assurance.
details.faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
details.faq.desc: Common questions about our industrial automation services and solutions.
details.faq.q1: What is the typical timeline for an automation project?
details.faq.a1: Project timelines vary by complexity. Most projects range from 8 to 20 weeks from design to commissioning.
details.faq.q2: Do you provide on-site installation and training?
details.faq.a2: Yes, we offer full on-site installation, commissioning, and operator training for all automation systems.
details.faq.q3: What automation brands do you work with?
details.faq.a3: We integrate leading brands including Siemens PLCs, Fanuc and KUKA robots, Cognex and Keyence vision systems, and Sick sensors.
details.cta.title: Need a Custom Automation Solution?
details.cta.desc: Contact our engineering team to discuss your project requirements and get a tailored solution.

contact.hero.desc: Have a project in mind? Contact our team to discuss your automation needs.

contact.faq.a1: MTS primarily serves the automotive industry and tier-1 suppliers in Morocco. We also serve general manufacturing, electronics, and industrial sectors.
contact.faq.a2: MTS is based in the Economic Activities Zone of Bni Ouassine, Province Fahs-Anjra, Tanger, Morocco.
contact.faq.q3: How do I request a quote?
contact.faq.a3: Fill out the contact form on this page, call +212 610 764 921, or email contact@multitechniques-services.ma. We respond within 24 hours.
